From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-06 11:34 EST
Subject: Re: Re: deployment blockers Timeline

Just checking in on the deployment blockers proposal. Our Infrastructure Manager is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
Date: 2024-02-01 16:51 EST
Subject: deployment blockers - Action Required

There's been a change in our timeline for deployment blockers. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-17 14:03 EST
Subject: Re: deployment blockers Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the deployment blockers proposal. Our Infrastructure Manager is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

Meeting: deployment blockers Discussion - Adatum Corporation
Date: 2024-01-09
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation), Raj Mehta (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is deployment blockers.

[00:07:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about cost optimization. Can we address those?

[00:10:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for timeline constraints is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:15:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:19:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is data residency.

[00:22:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): The timeline for timeline constraints is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:27:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about stakeholder alignment. Can we address those?

[00:29:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Let me add some context -- we've been working on integration complexity and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:31:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Let me add some context -- we've been working on vendor dependencies and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.
